treatment_information.specific_treatment: 25mm Tissue Aortic Valve replacement, CABG x2 (SVG-OM, LIMA-LAD), pulmonary vein isolation, left atrial appendage ligation
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient alert and oriented, nonfocal ambulating; incisional pain managed. Incisions healing well, no erythema or drainage.

treatment_timeline.event: Longstanding history of dyspnea, mild chest discomfort and fatigue with exertion reported.
Follow up with Dr. ___ for stress testing noted ischemia involving the Cx territory.
Aspirin started shortly after stress test.
Presented for left heart catheterization and found to have coronary artery disease.
Referred to cardiac surgery for revascularization.
Surgery performed including tissue valve replacement and CABG.

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented, ambulating but deconditioned.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointment with surgeon for driving and lifting instructions.
